rationale: Plan doc is curated evidence paired with committed ## Spike Results; mirrors .ll/learning-tests/ and .ll/decisions.d/; zero new infra.
rule: Track .ll/spikes/ (Option A): interactive spike plan docs live in git-tracked .ll/spikes/ via the !/.ll/ un-ignore
alternatives_rejected: Option B: gitignore .ll/spikes/ as regenerable scratch (weaker fit — creates asymmetric audit trail vs committed results section)
